kill_fact: No clean kill. The bear's load-bearing structural facts independently verify against primary sources (Q1 FY27 8-K + earnings call): record $291.0M rev (+16% YoY), data center $71.6M (+39% YoY) guided +35% sequential (~85% YoY), Q2 guide $328M / ~$0.61 adj-EPS, net debt ~$339M (principal ~$503M less $163.3M cash — NOT net cash), ACC/CopperEdge 1.6T production shipments started to a SINGLE US hyperscaler at the tail of Q1, divestiture in 'final stages' (serially-extended/cosmetic). The thesis posture (B / watchlist-for-capitulation, fully-priced at ~$159 with ~85% shared AI-capex factor + single-hyperscaler ACC binary) holds. BUT one load-bearing bear claim is now STALE and must be corrected (below), which is why this is CONFIRMED_WITH_CORRECTIONS, not a clean CONFIRMED.
corrections: STALE-ANCHOR on the 'GAAP net loss' pillar: the bear/dossier repeatedly leans on 'TTM GAAP still a net loss, four straight loss-years, GAAP-unprofitable base, the profit is entirely adjusted.' Primary source contradicts at the margin — the Q1 FY27 8-K reports GAAP NET INCOME of +$26.6M (positive). The full-year FY26 GAAP loss (~-$40M) and prior loss-years are real and the TTM may still net negative, but the company INFLECTED to GAAP-positive in the most recent quarter; framing it as currently 'GAAP-unprofitable' overstates the bear case and should be corrected to 'GAAP turned positive in Q1 FY27 (+$26.6M) off four prior loss-years; TTM near breakeven.' Second, minor: the deal is 'HieFo' ($34M cash, announced 2026-03-03, CFIUS-cleared), spelled 'Hyfo' in the result; the ~$80/module @3.2T content-escalation and 'GaN demand ~3x supply' figures are MANAGEMENT framing, not independently verifiable — do not treat as hard facts. Net debt is ~$339M (verified), the result's $338M is correct.
evidence: Semtech 8-K / Q1 FY2027 results (period ended 2026-04-27, reported 2026-05-26): net sales $291.0M, GAAP net income +$26.6M, cash $163.3M, long-term debt $492.0M (principal ~$503M), adj. gross margin ~53%, Q2 guide $328M +/- $5M and adj. EPS ~$0.61 — via StockTitan SEC-filing mirror of the 8-K, 2026-05-26.

Semtech Q1 FY2027 earnings call transcript (Motley Fool, 2026-05-26): data center net sales $71.6M up 39% YoY, Q2 guided +35% sequential (~85% YoY); 'we started shipping CopperEdge 1.6 ICs to our cable partners for deployment at a U.S. hyperscaler' (single-customer ACC ramp); 1.6T FiberEdge 'exceptionally strong bookings and backlog'; divestiture 'at the final stages'.

Semtech press release / semiconductor-today (2026-03-03/05): acquisition of HieFo Corporation for ~$34M cash, InP gain/DFB laser chips for DCI, reviewed and received CFIUS non-objection per the Jan-2-2026 Presidential order.

Globe and Mail / Motley Fool Q1 FY27 transcript coverage (2026-05-26): CopperEdge 1.6T ACC production shipments began at the tail end of Q1 with rack-level volume ramps expected mid-year — confirming the catalyst is dated/partly de-risked but single-hyperscaler-concentrated and not yet at scale.
